what_ifs: What if the climactic final battle against Thanos and his army took place during the day or at dawn, ensuring every epic moment and character action was brilliantly illuminated and visually clear?
What if the narrative meticulously balanced the screen time and impactful contributions of every major hero during the final act, ensuring no fan-favorite felt sidelined in the ultimate showdown?
What if pivotal heroes like Thor and Hulk had undergone character evolutions that resulted in less divisive physical designs, maintaining a more universally embraced heroic aesthetic?
